headline: Clorox CEO Search Puts Leadership And Recovery Efforts Under The Spotlight
summary: Clorox (NYSE:CLX) announced that Chair and CEO Linda Rendle will step down for health reasons. The Board has begun a comprehensive search process to identify the next CEO. The leadership transition comes as Clorox continues to address legal, margin, and operational pressures. For investors following NYSE:CLX, this leadership change comes at a time when the stock has faced a challenging share price record. The stock closed at $90.02, with the share price down 10.7% year to date and down...

headline: Clorox Announces Leadership Transition as CEO Linda Rendle Prepares to Exit
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 5.16% as of May 29, The Clorox Company (NYSE:CLX) is included among the Dividend Aristocrats Ranked By Yield: Top 10 Stocks.
